# ?? Issue Report

## ? Summary
Clearly describe the issue or feature request in one sentence.

## ?? Details
- What is happening?
- Why is this important?
- How does it affect the project?

## ?? Expected Outcome
Describe the ideal solution or behavior.

## ?? Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- .NET Version: [e.g. .NET 9.0]
- Project Version: [e.g. v1.0.0]

## ?? Suggested Fix / Enhancement
Provide a clear, actionable suggestion.  
*(This section makes the issue constructive and hard to reject.)*
